core_objective.text: BUILD VOLATILITY-TARGETING ALLOCATOR RESEARCH PIPELINE: estimate realized vol and regime (high/low vol states), dynamic leverage scaler targeting constant vol, apply to a baseline momentum signal on single-asset bars, simulate with drawdown brakes, emit risk reports (vol targeting error, turnover). Research only.

master_plan.title: Config + loader
master_plan.intent: config.py TARGET_VOL, LOOKBACK, smoke limits. data_loader.py + sample CSV. tests/test_loader.py.

master_plan.title: Vol estimator + regime detector
master_plan.intent: vol_engine.py: realized_vol(series, window), regime_hmm_simple (threshold-based high/low), vol_target_scalar(target_vol, realized).

master_plan.title: Baseline signal + allocator
master_plan.intent: signal.py simple momentum. allocator.py combine signal with vol scalar, drawdown brake, position bounds.

master_plan.title: Simulation + reports
master_plan.intent: simulate.py NAV path, vol targeting error metric. reports/risk_report.json + md.
